title: Mary, Queen of Scots becomes queen of Scotland
fact: Mary, Queen of Scots, also known as Mary Stuart or Mary I of Scotland, was Queen of Scotland from 14 December 1542 until her forced abdication on 24 July 1567.

title: James VI and I becomes king of Scotland
fact: James VI and I was King of Scotland as James VI from 24 July 1567, and King of England and Ireland as James I from the union of the Scottish and English crowns on 24 March 1603, until his death in 1625.

title: Charles I of England becomes king of Scotland
fact: Charles I was King of England, Scotland, and Ireland from 27 March 1625 until his execution in 1649.

title: Anne of Great Britain becomes queen of Scotland
fact: Anne was Queen of England, Scotland, and Ireland from 8 March 1702, and Queen of Great Britain and Ireland following the ratification of the Acts of Union 1707 merging the kingdoms of England and Scotland, until her death in 1714.

title: Charles II of England becomes king of Scotland
fact: Charles II was King of Scotland from 1649 until 1651 and King of England, Scotland, and Ireland from the 1660 Restoration of the monarchy until his death in 1685.

title: James II of England becomes king of Scotland
fact: James II and VII was King of England and Ireland as James II and King of Scotland as James VII from February 1685 until he was deposed in the 1688 Glorious Revolution.

title: Robert I of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Robert I, popularly known as Robert the Bruce, was King of Scots from 1306 until his death in 1329.

title: William III of England becomes king of Scotland
fact: William III and II, also known as William of Orange, was the sovereign Prince of Orange from birth, Stadtholder of Holland, Zeeland, Utrecht, Guelders, and Overijssel in the Dutch Republic from 1672, and King of England, Ireland, and Scotland from 1689 until his death in 1702.

title: Mary II of England becomes queen of Scotland
fact: Mary II was Queen of England, Scotland, and Ireland with her husband, King William III and II, from 1689 until her death in 1694.

title: James V of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: James V was King of Scotland from 9 September 1513 until his death in 1542.

title: James IV of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: James IV was King of Scotland from 11 June 1488 until his death at the Battle of Flodden in 1513.

title: Robert II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Robert II was King of Scots from 1371 to his death in 1390.

title: James II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: James II was King of Scots from 1437 until his death in 1460.

title: James III of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: James III was King of Scots from 1460 until his death at the Battle of Sauchieburn in 1488.

title: James I of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: James I was King of Scots from 1406 to 1437.

title: David II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: David II was King of Scotland from 1329 until his death in 1371.

title: Robert III of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Robert III, born John Stewart, was King of Scots from 1390 to his death in 1406.

title: John of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: John Balliol or John de Balliol, known derisively as Toom Tabard, was King of Scots from 1292 to 1296.

title: David I of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: David I was a 12th century ruler and saint who was Prince of the Cumbrians from 1113 to 1124 and King of Scotland from 1124 to 1153.

title: Alexander III of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Alexander III was King of Alba (Scotland) from 6 July 1249 until his death.

title: Alexander II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Alexander II (1198–1249) was King of Scotland from 1214 until his death.

title: William, king of Scotland (William the Lion) becomes king of Scotland
fact: William the Lion, sometimes styled William I and also known by the nickname Garbh, 'the Rough', reigned as King of Alba from 1165 to 1214.

title: Malcolm III of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Malcolm III was King of Alba (Scotland) from 1058 to 1093.

title: Alexander I of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Alexander I, posthumously nicknamed The Fierce, was the King of Alba (Scotland) from 1107 to his death.

title: Edgar becomes king of Scotland
fact: Edgar or Étgar mac Maíl Choluim, nicknamed Probus, "the Valiant", was King of Alba (Scotland) from 1097 to 1107.

title: Dub becomes king of Scotland
fact: Dub mac Maíl Coluim, called Dén and "the Black", was the king of Alba from 962.

title: Giric becomes king of Scotland
fact: Giric mac Dúngail, in modern English his name is Gregory or Greg MacDougal and nicknamed Mac Rath, was a king of the Picts or the king of Alba.

title: Indulf becomes king of Scotland
fact: Ildulb mac Causantín, anglicised as Indulf or Indulph, nicknamed An Ionsaighthigh, "the Aggressor" was king of Alba from 954 to 962.

title: Edward Balliol becomes king of Scotland
fact: Edward Balliol or Edward de Balliol was a claimant to the Scottish throne during the Second War of Scottish Independence.

title: Donald II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Domnall mac Causantín, anglicised as Donald II, was King of the Picts or King of Alba in the late 9th century.

title: Malcolm IV of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Malcolm IV, nicknamed Virgo, "the Maiden" was King of Scotland from 1153 until his death.

title: Malcolm I of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Máel Coluim mac Domnaill was king of Alba, becoming king when his cousin Constantine II abdicated to become a monk.

title: Donald III of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Donald III was King of Alba (Scotland) from 1093–1094 and 1094–1097.

title: Áed mac Cináeda becomes king of Scotland
fact: Áed mac Cináeda was a son of Cináed mac Ailpín.

title: Duncan II of Scotland becomes king of Scotland
fact: Donnchad mac Máel Coluim was King of Alba.

title: Domnall mac Ailpín becomes king of Scotland
fact: Domnall mac Ailpín, anglicised sometimes as Donald MacAlpin and known in most modern regnal lists as Donald I, was King of the Picts from 858 to 862.
